about.title: About Us
about.description: We offer three categories of adventures: Sea Tours, Desert Safari, and History Tours. On our Sea Tours, you can go diving to see the sea cow Dugong. During a Desert Safari, you can ride a camel. On our History Tours, you can visit the Pyramids and Luxor.
about.description2: With years of experience and a deep love for our homeland, we connect travelers from around the world with authentic Egyptian adventures. Whether you're seeking adrenaline-pumping quad bike rides, serene boat trips, or immersive desert safaris — we've got you covered.

bento.philDesc: We don't just sell tours; we build pathways to genuine local connection, prioritizing safety, eco-friendly practices, and premium hospitality.
bento.card3Desc: Explore spectacular reefs, secret snorkeling spots, and vibrant marine life with our professional crew.
bento.card4Desc: Feel the thrill of quad biking, stargazing, and camel rides in the majestic Sahara desert.
bento.card5Desc: Discover the secrets of ancient Egypt, visit majestic temples in Luxor, and explore the iconic pyramids.

reviewsPage.title: Clients Reviews
reviewsPage.subtitle: Read genuine feedback from clients who explored Egypt's most breathtaking spots with us.
reviewsPage.noReviewsDesc: We are currently gathering feedback from our adventurers. Check back soon for new reviews!

form.title: Leave a Review
form.subtitle: Share your journey with other adventurers
form.success: Thank you! Your review has been added.

review1.author: Michał Kowalski
review1.comment: Unbelievable experience! The snorkeling guide was incredibly knowledgeable. We saw turtles, a dolphin pod, and even got a glimpse of the rare Dugong. The lunch on the boat was delicious. 10/10 recommendation!

review2.author: Emma Watson
review2.comment: Our family did the desert safari and it was the highlight of our Egypt trip. Quad biking over the dunes at sunset was magic, and the stargazing at the Bedouin camp was breathtaking. The kids loved the camel ride.

review3.author: Sarah Jenkins
review3.comment: The history tour of Luxor was absolutely fascinating. Our guide spoke fluent English, explained the hieroglyphic details with passion, and avoided the tourist trap souvenir shops. Super professional and worth every penny!

review4.author: Katarzyna Nowak
review4.comment: Amazing organization! The dive instructors are extremely patient and safety-conscious. I was a bit nervous about scuba diving for the first time, but they made me feel completely relaxed. Beautiful coral reef!

review5.author: David Miller
review5.comment: Excellent communication from booking to drop-off. The safari was thrilling, the camel ride was peaceful, and the traditional Bedouin dinner was incredibly tasty. Very friendly team.

memoriesPage.title: Client Memories
memoriesPage.subtitle: A collection of beautiful, real moments shared by our clients on their tours.

items.item1: Happy families enjoying their Red Sea boat cruise.
items.item2: Sunset quad biking across Marsa Alam dunes.
items.item3: Stargazing and fire show at the Bedouin camp.
items.item4: Snorkeling alongside local green sea turtles.
items.item5: Group photo before heading out on desert safari.
items.item6: Diving with beautiful corals in Marsa Alam.
items.item7: Riding camels through desert trails at dusk.
items.item8: Exploring ancient historic temples in Luxor.
items.item9: Relaxing on a private speed boat excursion.
items.item10: A beautiful view of the Great Pyramids.
items.item11: Spotting wild spinner dolphins in the Red Sea.
items.item12: Bedouin style dinner under a starry Sahara night.

sea.title: Sea Tours
sea.desc: Experience the Red Sea like you never have before: plunge into crystal-clear waters and discover hidden coral reefs.

safari.title: Desert Safari
safari.desc: Experience the desert like you never have before: feel the rush of racing across golden dunes, connect with rich Bedouin traditions, stargaze under open skies, and enjoy a peaceful camel trek.

adventure.title: History Tours
adventure.desc: Travel back in time to visit the ancient Pyramids, historic temples in Luxor, and discover Egypt's rich legacy.

guides.title: Professional Guides
guides.desc: Experienced local guides who know every hidden gem.

prices.title: Best Prices
prices.desc: Competitive pricing with no hidden fees. Value for every budget.

safety.title: Safety First
safety.desc: Your safety is our top priority. Fully insured tours with certified equipment.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.desc: We're always here for you. Reach us anytime via WhatsApp.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Follow us on social media or chat with us directly

adventuresPage.title: Our Adventures
adventuresPage.subtitle: Discover the best things to do in Marsa Alam. Filter by category, select a tour to view full details, and book your dream adventure.

labels.whatsIncludedDesc: All equipment, guides, and transportation are fully organized for a premium experience.
labels.secureInstantly: Secure your tour instantly via WhatsApp pre-filled chat.

marsa_mubarak.title: Marsa Mubarak Trip
marsa_mubarak.desc: Enjoy a magical day aboard the best marine yachts, explore the Marsa Mubarak protectorate, and swim alongside spectacular coral reefs, vibrant fish, giant sea turtles, and dugongs (sea cows). The program includes a delicious lunch buffet and hot & cold beverages.
highlights: Sail on a premium yacht to the Marsa Mubarak protectorate
Swim with giant green sea turtles and rare dugongs (sea cows)
Explore vibrant coral reefs and tropical fish species
Delicious lunch buffet and hot/cold drinks included on board

dolphin.title: Samadai Dolphin House
dolphin.desc: Enjoy a magical day in the Samadai protectorate, explore the pristine coral reefs, and experience the thrill of swimming with wild dolphins in their natural habitat. The program includes lunch, beverages, and national park entry fees.
highlights: Swim with wild spinner dolphins in their natural lagoon
Snorkel in the crystal-clear waters of the Samadai Reef
National park entrance fees included in the price
Delicious lunch and refreshing drinks served on board

abudabbab.title: Abu Dabbab
abudabbab.desc: Spend an unforgettable time on the beaches of the Abu Dabbab protectorate. Explore the beauty of the coral reefs, swim alongside giant sea turtles, and spot the unique dugong (sea cow). The program includes national park entry fees.
highlights: Relax on the beautiful sandy beach of Abu Dabbab
Snorkel directly from the beach to see giant green turtles
Opportunity to spot the rare dugong (sea cow)
National park entry fees included in the program

sharm_el_luli.title: Sharm El Luli
sharm_el_luli.desc: Spend a wonderful time at Sharm El Luli beach, known for its crystal-clear water and white sands. You will also visit the Hankorab protectorate, mangrove forests, the El Qulaan protectorate, and the Meteor Lake (Nayzak). The program includes all national park entry fees.
highlights: Relax on the pristine white sands of Sharm El Luli beach
Visit the Hankorab protectorate and its unique mangrove trees
Explore the beautiful El Qulaan protectorate and natural lake
Visit the famous Meteor Lake (Nayzak) for a dip
All national park entry fees included in the price

super_quad.title: Moto 2 Hours
super_quad.desc: The perfect choice for an exciting evening with a traditional atmosphere.
highlights: 30-kilometer quad bike ride through the desert and scenic coastal areas
Camel ride to experience the true desert vibe
Incredible spectacle of colors over the desert hills at sunset
Delicious buffet dinner in Bedouin style
Oriental dance show with traditional music and belly dance
Stargazing on a magical evening away from city lights

moto_2_hours.title: Super Quad
moto_2_hours.desc: For those who prefer to welcome the day or enjoy a more peaceful route.
highlights: Sunrise; an incredible, crisp start to the day in the desert
Sunset (evening option available)
Simple, relaxing quad bike ride along the beach and through the desert

luxor.title: LUXOR (Day Trip or Overnight Option)
luxor.desc: The excursion starts early in the morning by private car or minibus (maximum 8 people). You will visit the Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut Temple, Karnak Temple, and the Colossi of Memnon with a professional guide. Lunch included. The overnight option also includes hotel accommodation and a hot air balloon flight.
highlights: Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut and Karnak Temples
Colossi of Memnon with a professional guide
Delicious local lunch included in the price
Overnight option includes hotel and hot air balloon flight

cairo.title: CAIRO
cairo.desc: The day trip to Cairo starts early in the morning. You can travel by private car, bus, or plane from Hurghada. During the tour, you will visit the Pyramids of Giza, the Sphinx, and the Grand Egyptian Museum. A professional guide will accompany you throughout the excursion to share fascinating historical facts. Lunch included.
highlights: Great Pyramids of Giza & the Great Sphinx
Guided tour of the Grand Egyptian Museum
Professional guide with deep historical insights
Delicious lunch included in the price

transfers.title: AIRPORT TRANSFERS
transfers.desc: We offer reliable private airport transfers to and from hotels in Marsa Alam and Hurghada. Our service includes punctual pickup, comfortable air-conditioned vehicles, and professional, experienced drivers. Whether you are arriving or departing, we guarantee a stress-free journey.
highlights: Private airport transfers Marsa Alam & Hurghada
Punctual pickup and hassle-free transit
Premium, comfortable air-conditioned vehicles
Professional, safe, and experienced drivers

marsa_alam_city.title: MARSA ALAM CITY TOUR
marsa_alam_city.desc: Discover the charm of Marsa Alam on a guided city tour. Walk through traditional streets, discover local homes, and learn about the daily life of residents. Visit a vibrant local market, where colorful spices, handmade souvenirs, and a friendly bargaining atmosphere create a true oriental vibe.
highlights: Guided walking tour of traditional streets
Learn about local culture and daily resident life
Vibrant spice and local souvenir market visit
Warm oriental vibe and friendly bargaining

el_quseir.title: EL QUSEIR
el_quseir.desc: Explore the historical charm of El Quseir, one of the oldest cities on the Red Sea. Wander through traditional streets, discover local homes and vibrant markets. Visit important landmarks, including the historic mosque and Coptic church, and learn about the city's fascinating history with a professional guide.
highlights: Explore one of the oldest ports on the Red Sea
Visit the historic mosque and Coptic church
Traditional narrow streets, houses, and souks
Fascinating local history with a professional guide

transfersPage.title: Airport Transfers
transfersPage.subtitle: Comfortable, punctual, and safe private transfers to and from Marsa Alam & Hurghada airports.
transfersPage.introDesc: We offer reliable private airport transfers to and from hotels in Marsa Alam and Hurghada. Our service includes punctual pickup, comfortable air-conditioned vehicles, and professional, experienced drivers. Whether you are arriving or departing, we guarantee a stress-free journey.

punctual.title: Punctual & Reliable
punctual.desc: We monitor your flight status to ensure our driver is waiting for you right on time, even if there are delays.

comfort.title: Premium Comfort
comfort.desc: Travel in comfortable, clean, and fully air-conditioned modern private vehicles.

safety.title: Professional Drivers
safety.desc: Our experienced, polite, and licensed drivers prioritize your safety and peace of mind.

pricing.title: Fixed Pricing
pricing.desc: Transparent rates with no hidden fees or extra costs. What you see is what you pay.
